review_text: Bohat hi acha kaam kiya unhone, mein bohat khush hun
Staff ne bohat izzat di aur masla foran hal kar diya
Service achi thi aur rate bhi munasib laga mujhe
Mechanic kaafi mahir tha, gaari ab bilkul sahi chal rahi hai
Mashallah behtareen tajurba raha, sab ko recommend karunga
Jaldi kaam ho gaya aur koi extra paisa nahi liya
Genuine parts mile aur staff bhi cooperative tha
Dil khush ho gaya itni achi service dekh kar
Bohat professional log hain, kaam time pe poora kiya
Gaari nai jaisi ho gayi, paise wasool ho gaye
Saaf suthra showroom aur tameez daar staff, zabardast
Har cheez achi tarah samjhai unhone, mutmain hun
Bahut bekar service hai, paise zaya kar diye
Staff bohat badtameez tha aur kaam bhi ghatiya
Yahan sab mehnga hai aur quality bilkul nahi
Jhoot bol kar zyada paise liye, fraud log hain
Gaari time pe nahi mili, hafton tak intezaar karwaya
Mistri ne masla theek karne ki bajaye barha diya
Bilkul faltu jagah hai, dobara kabhi nahi aaunga
Customer ki koi izzat nahi, koi baat tak nahi sunta
Parts available nahi the aur baar baar bula kar tang kiya
Service ke baad naya masla aa gaya, bohat bura experience
Sirf loot hai yahan, har cheez ka faltu paisa lete hain
Kaam chor staff hai, kuch karte hi nahi sirf paise lete hain
